title: Developer caches & build artifacts
_comment: Regenerable caches created by developer tools. method: rm = delete permanently, rmforce = chmod +w then delete (for read-only caches like Go modules & Cargo sources). Paths may use ~ and * globs. default:true = pre-selected. Rule of thumb for default: true means 'costs a rebuild or a small re-download'; false means 'costs a large re-download, or the data may not regenerate on its own'.

categories.name: Xcode derived data & device support
categories.desc: Xcode build cache, device-support & documentation cache — rebuilt on next build.

categories.name: Xcode archives
categories.desc: Release .xcarchive bundles — hold the dSYMs needed to symbolicate crash reports from shipped builds. Do NOT clear if you still support those releases.

categories.name: Go build & tooling cache
categories.desc: go build/test cache, gopls/goimports indexes & golangci-lint cache — regenerated on build.

categories.name: Go module cache
categories.desc: Downloaded Go modules ($GOPATH/pkg/mod) — re-fetched on next 'go build'.

categories.name: Node / npm cache
categories.desc: npm download cache, npx package cache, logs & prebuilt binaries — re-fetched on install.

categories.name: JS build-tool caches
categories.desc: Turbo/Vite/webpack/Parcel/ESLint/Prettier & Electron download caches — rebuilt on next build.

categories.name: pnpm store
categories.desc: pnpm's content-addressable package store — re-downloaded on next install.

categories.name: Yarn cache
categories.desc: Yarn's global package cache — re-downloaded on next install.

categories.name: Gradle user cache
categories.desc: Gradle downloaded dependencies, build cache & daemon state in ~/.gradle — re-fetched on build. Stop the Gradle daemon first if one is running.

categories.name: Maven repository
categories.desc: Locally cached Maven artifacts (~/.m2) — re-downloaded on next build.

categories.name: sbt / Ivy caches
categories.desc: sbt launchers & Ivy dependency cache — re-fetched on next build.

categories.name: Cargo registry cache
categories.desc: Cargo's downloaded crate cache, git checkouts & rustup downloads — re-fetched on next build.

categories.name: Python cache (pip / uv / poetry)
categories.desc: pip, uv, poetry & pyenv download caches plus ruff/mypy indexes — re-downloaded or rebuilt on next run.

categories.name: ML model & training caches
categories.desc: Hugging Face / PyTorch / TensorFlow / Keras model downloads & W&B run cache — regenerable, but often many GB to re-download.

categories.name: Conda package cache
categories.desc: Downloaded conda packages & tarballs — re-downloaded on next install. Your environments themselves are untouched.

categories.name: Ruby / Bundler caches
categories.desc: rbenv build cache, gem specs & Bundler package cache — re-fetched on next 'bundle install'.

categories.name: Bun cache
categories.desc: Bun's install cache — re-downloaded on next install.

categories.name: Deno cache
categories.desc: Deno's module & compilation cache — re-fetched on next run.

categories.name: CocoaPods cache
categories.desc: CocoaPods spec & pod download cache — re-fetched on next 'pod install'.

categories.name: Swift Package Manager cache
categories.desc: SwiftPM's cloned-dependency & artifact cache — re-fetched on next resolve.

categories.name: Docker buildx cache
categories.desc: buildx build cache on the host (not the daemon's data) — rebuilt on next build. Docker credentials in ~/.docker are untouched.

categories.name: Cloud CLI caches & logs
categories.desc: kubectl / AWS / gcloud / Azure CLI caches & logs — regenerated on next command. Credentials and configs are untouched.

categories.name: PHP Composer cache
categories.desc: Composer's package download cache — re-fetched on next install.

categories.name: NuGet package cache
categories.desc: Locally cached .NET NuGet packages — re-downloaded on next restore.

categories.name: Bazel / Zig / OCaml caches
categories.desc: Bazel & Zig build caches and opam's download cache — rebuilt or re-fetched on next build.

categories.name: Dart / Flutter caches
categories.desc: Flutter engine cache & the Dart pub package cache — re-downloaded on next 'pub get' / build.

categories.name: AI CLI tool caches
categories.desc: Scratch caches for terminal AI tools — regenerated on next run. Session state & credentials (~/.claude, ~/.codex) are never touched.

categories.name: CI runner caches
categories.desc: Local GitLab/CircleCI runner & SonarQube analysis caches — re-fetched on next run.

categories.name: Shell & CLI tool residue
categories.desc: zsh completion dumps, oh-my-zsh cache and curl/wget scratch state — regenerated on next shell start or download.

categories.name: pre-commit hook cache
categories.desc: pre-commit's installed hook environments — rebuilt on next run.

categories.name: mise / asdf tool cache
categories.desc: mise's download cache — re-fetched on next install. Installed tool versions are untouched.

categories.name: JetBrains caches & logs
categories.desc: IntelliJ/PyCharm/etc. index caches & logs — rebuilt on next launch.

categories.name: Playwright / Puppeteer browsers
categories.desc: Downloaded test browsers — re-installed by 'playwright install'.

categories.name: Homebrew download cache
categories.desc: Downloaded bottles & installers ('brew cleanup') — re-fetched on demand.

categories.name: Android build caches
categories.desc: Android SDK/Gradle & Android Studio transient caches — rebuilt by the toolchain.

categories.name: Expo caches
categories.desc: Expo's downloaded client/template/schema caches — re-fetched on demand. Your Expo login (~/.expo/state.json) is untouched.
